synopsis:
In real life, the protagonists, Xiao Te and Xiao Fei, are just ordinary children. However, in the dream world, they are "superheroes" protecting dreams! They enter children's dreams with dream fairies possessing special abilities, transforming into warriors to fight against dream demons who want to distort children's dreams and gain nightmare power. They prevent the dream demons from ruling the dreams and protect the children's happy and wonderful dream world. In each episode, a child is affected by the nightmare power of the dream demon Mo La, losing faith in their dreams. With the help of the professor, Xiao Te and Xiao Fei enter the children's dreams, defeat the dream demons, and regain their dreams. The intense battles between good and evil, along with the humorous and entertaining storylines, allow children to experience the power of justice, friendship, and dreams while watching the animation.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

missingSources: episodes (no data from Zenshin or Jikan)
